title: Iterative replacement training is viable, but planning is still unmeasured
decision: Use 25% wrong-token refinement and four-to-eight grouped trajectories; run target-free receding-horizon planning before selecting the trajectory count or prior coefficient.
plain_summary: Replacement-only multi-path training works, pure unmasking compresses the state geometry, and a learned full-vocabulary prior is necessary because the old candidate pool covers only ten percent of improving actions.
